svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="CI-CD Deployment to Cloud Run" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-824" dy="-345" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" value="CI/CD Pipeline — Triển khai Microservices lên Google Cloud Run" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="400" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw-github" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;swimlaneFillColor=#fafafa;" value="GitHub Actions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="220" width="1520" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trigger-push" parent="sw-github" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="Push to master
(paths: apps/*)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="trigger-manual" parent="sw-github" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="workflow_dispatch
(chọn service thủ công)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="40" y="125" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="detect-changes" parent="sw-github" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="detect-changes
(dorny/paths-filter@v4)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="290" y="75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="output-flags" parent="sw-github" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=10;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="Output: true/false flags

(mỗi job gọi workflow_call
tới file deploy-*.yml)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="1040" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="sw-github" source="trigger-push" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.3;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="detect-changes" value=""> <mxGeometry height="200" width="1520" x="40" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-checkout" parent="sw-build" (actions/checkout@v4)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="160" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-gcp-auth" parent="sw-build" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;" value="2. GCP Auth
(Service Account Key)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="280" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-docker-build" parent="sw-build" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;" value="3. Docker Build
Multi-stage: node:24-alpine
builder → runner" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="210" x="510" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-push" parent="sw-build" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;" value="4. Push Image
docker push →
Artifact Registry" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="55" width="170" x="780" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-deploy" parent="sw-build" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="5. Deploy to Cloud Run
(gcloud run deploy /
deploy-cloudrun@v2)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="190" x="1010" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="config-detail" parent="sw-build" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=10;" value="Cấu hình: --region=asia-southeast1 --platform=managed --allow-unauthenticated
--min-instances, --max-instances, --cpu, --memory, --timeout, --concurrency, --use-http2
--set-env-vars (MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, S3, Firebase, JWT, ...)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1140" x="60" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb1" edge="1" parent="sw-build" source="step-checkout" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="step-gcp-auth" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb2" edge="1" parent="sw-build" source="step-gcp-auth" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="step-docker-build" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb3" edge="1" parent="sw-build" source="step-docker-build" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="step-push" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eb4" edge="1" parent="sw-build" source="step-push" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="step-deploy" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw-gcp" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;swimlaneFillColor=#f6fff6;" value="Google Cloud Platform — asia-southeast1 (Singapore)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="1520" x="40" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="artifact-registry" parent="sw-gcp" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;size=20;" value="Artifact Registry
asia-southeast1-docker.pkg.dev
project-xxx/microservices/<service>:latest" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="300" x="60" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cr-gateway" parent="sw-gcp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" value="api-gateway-service
min=0 max=3 cpu=1 mem=4Gi
timeout=60s conc=100" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="180" x="440" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cr-auth" parent="sw-gcp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" value="auth-service
min=0 max=10 cpu=1 mem=4Gi

min=0 max=10 cpu=1 mem=4Gi
timeout=60s conc=1000 HTTP/2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="180" x="860" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cr-chat-storage" parent="sw-gcp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=9;" value="chat-storage-service ⚡
min=1 max=6 cpu=1 mem=2Gi
timeout=300s no-cpu-throttling" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="200" x="1070" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cr-filesystem" parent="sw-gcp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" value="filesystem-service

min=1 max=5 cpu=1 mem=4Gi
timeout=60s conc=100 HTTP/2" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="190" x="440" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cr-ai" parent="sw-gcp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" value="ai-service

min=0 max=10 cpu=1 mem=4Gi
timeout=3600s conc=1000" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="65" width="180" x="860" y="150" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cr-learning" parent="sw-gcp" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" value="learning-service

id="label-cr" parent="sw-gcp" style="text;html=1;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;align=left;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;fontColor=#82b366;" value="Cloud Run (Serverless)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="440" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="label-vm" parent="sw-gcp" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-note" parent="sw-gcp" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#b85450;align=left;" value="⚡ = min-instances=1 (luôn chạy)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="220" x="440" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ear-to-cr" edge="1" parent="sw-gcp" source="artifact-registry" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="cr-gateway" value="pull image"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sw-external" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=30;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;swimlaneFillColor=#fafafa;" value="External Services / Infrastructure Dependencies" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="1520" x="40" y="940" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext-mongo" parent="sw-external" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;size=15;" value="MongoDB
(Primary Database)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="60" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext-redis" parent="sw-external" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;size=15;" value="Redis
(Cache / Session)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="260" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext-kafka" parent="sw-external" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Kafka
(Event Streaming)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="150" x="460" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext-s3" parent="sw-external" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="S3 / Cloudflare R2
(File Storage)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="170" x="660" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext-firebase" parent="sw-external" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Firebase Cloud Messaging
(Push Notification)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="190" x="880" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext-discord" parent="sw-external" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" value="Discord Webhook
(Deploy Notification)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="1120" y="55" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="usage-label" parent="sw-external" style="text;html=1;fontSize=8;fontColor=#666666;align=center;" value="Used by: Auth, Chat, Chat-Storage, Filesystem, Notification, AI, Learning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="15" width="400" x="40" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="comm-gcp-ext" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#666666;align=center;" value="TCP / gRPC / Kafka Protocol" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="200" x="600" y="920" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-build-to-ar" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-push" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="artifact-registry" value="push images"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-deploy-to-cr" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-deploy" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#666666;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="cr-gateway" value="deploy"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e-discord" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-deploy" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;fontSize=9;fontColor=#9673a6;strokeColor=#9673a6;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="ext-discord" value="send result"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1340" y="478" /> <mxPoint x="1340" y="930" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="comm-box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=5;" value="Internal Communication:
• Gateway ↔ Microservices: gRPC (HTTP/2)
• Async Events: Kafka
• Cache / Session: Redis
• File Storage: S3 / Cloudflare R2
• Push Notifications: Firebase FCM
• WebSocket: Socket Service → Client
• WebRTC Media: SFU → Browser (UDP)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="440" x="1120" y="1140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: CI/CD Pipeline — Triển khai Microservices lên Google Cloud Run

div.div:
Output: true/false flags
service-auth | service-api-gateway | service-noti
service-filesystem | service-chat | service-chat-storage
service-ai | service-socket | service-learning | service-sfu

div.div:
10 Parallel Deploy Jobs
(mỗi job gọi workflow_call
tới file deploy-*.yml)

--set-env-vars (MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, S3, Firebase, JWT, ...)

div.div:
Internal Communication:
• Gateway ↔ Microservices: gRPC (HTTP/2)
• Async Events: Kafka
• Cache / Session: Redis
• File Storage: S3 / Cloudflare R2
• Push Notifications: Firebase FCM
• WebSocket: Socket Service → Client
• WebRTC Media: SFU → Browser (UDP)

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
